heading: Transportation of civilian clothing of enlisted members
label: 2638 Transportation of civilian clothing of enlisted members
text: The Secretary of the military department concerned may provide for the transportation of the civilian clothing of any person entering the armed forces as an enlisted member to the member’s home of record.
